title: Duplicate item multiple times
excerpt:
I need to add an item to a board that occurs every Monday, and also multiple items that occur every Friday - these will be on the dame board. 
Is there a quick way to duplicate item multiple times rather than keep having…

posts.author: Kate.wyeth (Kate)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need to add an item to a board that occurs every Monday, and also multiple items that occur every Friday - these will be on the dame board.

Is there a quick way to duplicate item multiple times rather than keep having to hit duplicate and then edit to remove the (copy)? I’ve looked into automations but seems to only be an option to add an item once when you hit a certain time period.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
What about using the workflow center? The items created would still have the word copy in them that you’ll need to remove manually OR with a 3rd party app.

image1211×681 37.6 KB

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: Kate.wyeth (Kate)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks. ideally I need the whole year’s worth added in one go, rather than them copying every set time period
